name: Image Analysis Plugin
description: Analyzes images using Doubao multimodal model, and uploads files to Aliyun OSS. Prefer plugin config in openclaw.json; otherwise use env: DOUBAO_API_KEY, DOUBAO_MODEL, OSS_REGION, OSS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, OSS_ACCESS_KEY_SECRET, OSS_BUCKET.

apiKey.description: Doubao / Volcengine Ark API key (Bearer token)

apiKey.label: Doubao API Key
apiKey.help: 豆包 / 方舟 API Key；也可通过环境变量 DOUBAO_API_KEY 提供

model.label: Doubao Model
model.help: 多模态模型 ID；未填时可用 DOUBAO_MODEL，默认 doubao-seed-2-0-pro-260215

oss.region.label: OSS Region
oss.region.help: 例如 oss-cn-beijing；或环境变量 OSS_REGION
